meaning: n.地方法官,治安推事,市政长官,[律]宣誓证明(附于宣誓书后,证明宣誓时间、地点和监誓人等)
examples: The founder of Jersey Hospice Care, Jurat Jean King, has died after a two-year illness.
Jurat Mike Tanguy has been appointed MBE for his roles in several Guernsey charities.
She was made an MBE for her services to the hospice and served as a jurat for more than seven years.
